messages.content: When is the next bus for Euclid loop?

outputs.final_response:
The next bus for the Euclid Loop is scheduled to depart from College Place at 8:00 PM, arriving at the following stops:

- Genesee Irving at 8:07 PM
- Genesee Crouse at 8:08 PM
- Genesee Westcott at 8:12 PM
- Westcott Euclid at 8:16 PM
- College Place at 8:25 PM

Since the current time is 7:55 PM, you can catch this bus. 

For the latest schedules, you can also check [here](https://parking.syr.edu/transportation/shuttle-information/campus-shuttle-schedules/).
